chunks.title: Job Sequencing with Deadline - Branch and Bound - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: The problem is job sequencing with deadlines.

chunks.title: Job Sequencing with Deadline - Branch and Bound - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: This problem can be solved using branch and bound.

chunks.title: Job Sequencing with Deadline - Branch and Bound - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Even this problem can be solved using greedy method and dynamic programming.

chunks.title: Job Sequencing with Deadline - Branch and Bound - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: But let us learn how it can be solved using branch and bound.

chunks.title: Job Sequencing with Deadline - Branch and Bound - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: But one thing we should remember that branch and bound is useful for solving minimization

chunks.title: Job Sequencing with Deadline - Branch and Bound - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: problem it cannot solve maximization.

chunks.title: Job Sequencing with Deadline - Branch and Bound - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: If you know something about job sequencing with deadline it is a maximization problem

chunks.title: Job Sequencing with Deadline - Branch and Bound - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: like profits are given for the jobs and we want the maximum profit.

chunks.title: Job Sequencing with Deadline - Branch and Bound - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So we have converted the problem instead of profit we are taking penalty here.

chunks.title: Job Sequencing with Deadline - Branch and Bound - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So penalty means we have to pay, we will not gain but we will lose.

chunks.title: Job Sequencing with Deadline - Branch and Bound - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So instead of profit we are calling it as penalty.

chunks.title: Job Sequencing with Deadline - Branch and Bound - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So now the problem is to select the jobs and finish them within their deadline such that

chunks.title: Job Sequencing with Deadline - Branch and Bound - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: the penalty is minimized.

chunks.title: Job Sequencing with Deadline - Branch and Bound - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Now if you are minimizing the penalty means automatically the profit is maximized.

chunks.title: Job Sequencing with Deadline - Branch and Bound - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So just the name we have changed instead of profit we are calling it as penalty.

chunks.title: Job Sequencing with Deadline - Branch and Bound - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: And one more thing here is these are the deadlines for each job and these are the times taken

chunks.title: Job Sequencing with Deadline - Branch and Bound - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: by each job.

chunks.title: Job Sequencing with Deadline - Branch and Bound - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: The amount of time taken for completion of the jobs is varying it is not same one unit

chunks.title: Job Sequencing with Deadline - Branch and Bound - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: of time they are having different times.

chunks.title: Job Sequencing with Deadline - Branch and Bound - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: We will solve it using branch and bound and the approach of solving is by generating a

chunks.title: Job Sequencing with Deadline - Branch and Bound - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: state space tree.

chunks.title: Job Sequencing with Deadline - Branch and Bound - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So we will be generating the nodes and for each node we will define two values we compute

chunks.title: Job Sequencing with Deadline - Branch and Bound - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: two values that are cost and upper bound.

chunks.title: Job Sequencing with Deadline - Branch and Bound - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: Let us see what is upper bound and cost.

chunks.title: Job Sequencing with Deadline - Branch and Bound - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: See upper bound for each node will be sum of all the penalties except those which are

chunks.title: Job Sequencing with Deadline - Branch and Bound - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: included in the solution.

chunks.title: Job Sequencing with Deadline - Branch and Bound - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So upper bound is sum of all the penalties except those which are included in a solution

chunks.title: Job Sequencing with Deadline - Branch and Bound - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: and the cost is sum of all the penalties till the job that you have considered.

chunks.title: Job Sequencing with Deadline - Branch and Bound - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So cost is sum of all the penalties till the last job that we have considered.

chunks.title: Job Sequencing with Deadline - Branch and Bound - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: If S is the set of jobs that are included in a solution then the upper bound is sum

chunks.title: Job Sequencing with Deadline - Branch and Bound - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: of the penalties of all those jobs which are not in that set.

chunks.title: Job Sequencing with Deadline - Branch and Bound - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: And the cost is sum of all those jobs that are not in the set their penalties are added

chunks.title: Job Sequencing with Deadline - Branch and Bound - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: and here we will consider up to the job that we have taken.

chunks.title: Job Sequencing with Deadline - Branch and Bound - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So let us say kth job up to kth job.

chunks.title: Job Sequencing with Deadline - Branch and Bound - Abdul Bari
chunks.text: So while solving I will explain how these two are calculated.

text: The problem is job sequencing with deadlines. This problem can be solved using branch and bound. Even this problem can be solved using greedy method and dynamic programming. But let us learn how it can be solved using branch and bound. But one thing we should remember that branch and bound is useful for solving minimization problem it cannot solve maximization. If you know something about job sequencing with deadline it is a maximization problem like profits are given for the jobs and we want the maximum profit. So we have converted the problem instead of profit we are taking penalty here. So penalty means we have to pay, we will not gain but we will lose. So instead of profit we are calling it as penalty. So now the problem is to select the jobs and finish them within their deadline such that the penalty is minimized. Now if you are minimizing the penalty means automatically the profit is maximized. So just the name we have changed instead of profit we are calling it as penalty. And one more thing here is these are the deadlines for each job and these are the times taken by each job. The amount of time taken for completion of the jobs is varying it is not same one unit of time they are having different times. We will solve it using branch and bound and the approach of solving is by generating a state space tree. So we will be generating the nodes and for each node we will define two values we compute two values that are cost and upper bound. Let us see what is upper bound and cost. See upper bound for each node will be sum of all the penalties except those which are included in the solution. So upper bound is sum of all the penalties except those which are included in a solution and the cost is sum of all the penalties till the job that you have considered. So cost is sum of all the penalties till the last job that we have considered. If S is the set of jobs that are included in a solution then the upper bound is sum of the penalties of all those jobs which are not in that set. And the cost is sum of all those jobs that are not in the set their penalties are added and here we will consider up to the job that we have taken. So let us say kth job up to kth job. So while solving I will explain how these two are calculated. Let us generate a state space tree this is the first node and the cost is nothing 0 and the upper bound is infinity and here we will maintain one value that is upper and that is also we will keep it as infinity. Now one by one we will consider the job first job let us say it is included in the solution first job if job1 is included then what is the cost? If job1 is included in the cost then till job1 you see so anything we are skipping nothing we are skipping so the cost is 0 only. Now when first job is in the solution remaining jobs penalties that is 10 plus 6 plus 3 so penalties 10 plus 6 plus 3 is 19 so this is upper. Now we got one upper value which is less than that infinity so update this one 19. Now next job job1 is over so job2 third node what is the cost? This means that we are including second job so first job we are not doing so what is the penalty of first job 5 and what is upper? So except second job we have to take the penalties of all so this is 5 plus 6 plus 3. 5 plus 6 plus 3 is 14 so this is updated to 14 so if we are getting any new upper value which is smaller than that one we will change it. Now next node we will consider third job that is job3 so here the cost so it means that we are just taking third job we are not doing first second and fourth job so till third job if you consider till here only we should consider so how many jobs we are leaving that is 5 and 10 so 5 and 10 so that is 15.
